name: engineering-workflow
description: Evidence-first engineering delivery with scalable investigation, planning, adversarial review, implementation, and verification workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Investigate, plan, challenge, build, and verify
interface.longDescription: Runs lightweight or full engineering workflows with execution-first investigation, modular subagent review, completeness checks, and evidence-based reporting.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the appropriate engineering delivery workflow for this task.
